task_context.question: What actress was in Game of Thrones and The Moorside?
task_context.agent_role: Produce one compact second-hop retrieval query targeting the missing bridge or supporting evidence.

visible_agent_inputs.question: What actress was in Game of Thrones and The Moorside?
visible_agent_inputs.summary_1:
First-hop evidence: Passage [7] — "Susan Brown (English actress) ... best known for role as Septa Mordane" (Game of Thrones).

Bridge needed: Confirm whether Susan Brown appeared in the TV drama "The Moorside" (i.e., verify Susan Brown is billed in The Moorside), or identify which actress is credited in both works.

Retrieval direction:
1. Fetch the page titled "Susan Brown (English actress)" and inspect the Filmography/Television credits for any credit titled "The Moorside".
2. Fetch the page titled "The Moorside" (TV drama) and inspect the Cast section for "Susan Brown" and for actors also credited in Game of Thrones. 
3. If the Wikipedia pages are ambiguous, run site:wikipedia.org search: "Susan Brown The Moorside" and "The Moorside cast" and check the cited cast lists.

The Moorside (TV drama) Wikipedia cast

retrieved_doc_snippets: Wikidumper.org | WikiDumper.org is a website created by Clifford A. Pickover that promises to permanently record a snapshot of the "best of the Wikipedia rejects", articles that are slated for deletion at the site. WikiDumper was launched on November 4, 2006, and accepts user submissions. Although the site doesn't specify its criteria for inclusion, many of its articles don't cite their sources. The site has been criticized as likely to be less accurate than Wikipedia.

Simple English Wikipedia | The Simple English Wikipedia is an English edition of the online encyclopedia Wikipedia, primarily written in Basic English and Special English. It is one of five Wikipedias written in an Anglic language, the others being the English Wikipedia, the Pitkern-Norfuk Wikipedia, the Scots Wikipedia, and the Old English Wikipedia, though the last is largely unintelligible to speakers of the modern language. English Wikipedia | The English Wikipedia is the English-language edition of the free online encyclopedia Wikipedia. - Sample-specific anchors may appear only when they already occur in the
  visible agent inputs below.
- Do not mention gold labels, oracle labels, evaluation metrics, missing

- Preserve useful behavior and evidence already present at the source.
